narrative:
Columbia Township has 6,432 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
